sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, timestamp_col TIMESTAMP, inet_col INET);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, timestamp_col, inet_col) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00', inet '192.168.1.0/24');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, timestamp_col, inet_col) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-07 12:00:00', inet '192.168.1.1');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, timestamp_col, inet_col) VALUES (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-14 12:00:00', inet NULL);
SELECT weekofyear(A.timestamp_col), A.inet_col FROM test_dates A WHERE A.inet_col >> inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT A.id, weekofyear(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS current_week FROM test_dates A WHERE weekofyear(A.timestamp_col) = weekofyear(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 12:00:00') AND A.inet_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT weekofyear(A.timestamp_col), COUNT(*) FROM test_dates A GROUP BY weekofyear(A.timestamp_col) HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT A.id, weekofyear(A.timestamp_col), CASE WHEN A.inet_col IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS inet_exists FROM test_dates A WHERE weekofyear(A.timestamp_col) IN (SELECT weekofyear(B.timestamp_col) FROM test_dates B WHERE B.inet_col IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY inet_exists;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, timestamp_col FROM test_dates WHERE inet_col IS NULL;
SELECT weekofyear(NOW()), COUNT(*) FROM temp_dates GROUP BY weekofyear(NOW();
SELECT A.id, weekofyear(A.timestamp_col) FROM test_dates A JOIN test_dates B ON A.id = B.id WHERE A.inet_col >> B.inet_col AND weekofyear(A.timestamp_col) > weekofyear(B.timestamp_col);
